search_query: surprising trivia about it's a wonderful life
combined_text: Five Things You Might Not Know About It's A Wonderful Life It's a Wonderful Life has become a holiday tradition in America as much as Christmas trees, Mistletoe and TV Specials with Charlie Brown. The 1946 motion picture is shown on TV every single year during the Christmas season, and remains one of the most popular (and acclaimed) movies of all time. Here
